expectations.text: A report.md file was created in the outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.md exists at the expected path

expectations.text: Report correctly identifies the project's tech stack
expectations.evidence: Stack table: 'JavaScript (ES Modules), Node.js, Express 5.2, express + dotenv (2 production deps)'

expectations.text: Report contains findings from multiple distinct analysis dimensions
expectations.evidence: 6 findings across Maintainability (server.js monolith, stale docs), Reliability (XSS, no error boundaries), State (memory cleanup, data loading)

expectations.text: Report includes a 'what's working well' section
expectations.evidence: 'What's Working Well' with 6 items: low coupling, clean separation, webhook contract, developer ergonomics, OAuth thoroughness, README quality

expectations.text: Report gives a clear picture of major components and relationships
expectations.evidence: 'Overall Shape Summary' section plus detailed evidence throughout about webhook routing, tool handler pattern, OAuth flow, and two-repo relationship

expectations.text: Findings reference specific file paths as evidence
Report would help a new developer understand the codebase
expectations.evidence: Comprehensive structure overview, clear explanation of webhook contract, tool handler pattern, and how this repo relates to crm-web. The 'Overall Shape Summary' section is specifically written as an orientation.
